items.name_en: Includes full original retail packaging đź’– M's most special biker bag this year, featuring new vintage-soft calfskin. items.name_en: Large
items.name_cn:
Large
MIUMIU Long Handle Baguette Bag
Recently inspired by the trendy long-handle baguette design. The 24 Fall/Winter new arrival revolves around a 'girlish sentiment' with a scholarly vibe. It embodies an uninhibited and elegant young lady's attitude and a casual outlook on life, unique to Miu Miu girls. Not too big or small, just right. Sweet, spicy, or cool. The capacity meets daily needs. Good-looking and practical. Hard not to love it.
Size: Base 28Ă—8Ă—16cm

items.name_en: Miu Miu Reproduction
items.name_cn:
Miu Miu Reproduction
New best-selling vintage tote bag, made with new soft lambskin leather. The leather is soft and premium. This Aventure Nappa leather bag is inspired by Miu Miu's classic designs. The structure has been adjusted to be lighter and exudes a new personality. It features a embossed letter logo, adding a signature element. Vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, with a zip pocket and patch pocket. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry. Dimensions: 31x40x13cm, comes with original packaging 5BG291

specs.rawTitle:
Miu Miu Reproduction
New best-selling vintage tote bag, made with new soft lambskin leather. The leather is soft and premium. This Aventure Nappa leather bag is inspired by Miu Miu's classic designs. The structure has been adjusted to be lighter and exudes a new personality. It features a embossed letter logo, adding a signature element. Vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, with a zip pocket and patch pocket. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry. Dimensions: 31x40x13cm, comes with original packaging 5BG291
